name: Alex Johnson
bio: Met during freshman year at university. Alex is a software engineer at a startup now, loves weekend hiking trips and specialty coffee chats. We bonded over late-night debugging sessions.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: My former manager who became a close friend. Priya is now a product director at a fintech company. She gives incredible career advice and throws amazing dinner parties.

name: Marcus Williams
bio: Known Marcus since we were 8 years old — grew up on the same street. He's now a jazz musician touring across the US. Despite the distance, we try to catch up regularly.

name: Sophie Laurent
bio: Met Sophie on a solo trip to Lisbon three years ago. We've kept in touch ever since and have traveled together to Morocco and Japan. She's a freelance photographer based in Paris.

name: Jordan Chen
bio: Workout partner turned best friend. Jordan is a physical therapist who keeps me accountable at the gym. We grab breakfast every Sunday after our morning runs.

name: Amara Okonkwo
bio: We met at a local book club two years ago. Amara is an incredibly thoughtful novelist working on her second book. Our conversations about literature and life philosophy are always enlightening.

name: Ethan Rivera
bio: My college roommate for three years. Ethan is now a marine biologist doing research in the Pacific Northwest. Life got busy for both of us, but our friendship has always been effortless.

name: Yuki Tanaka
bio: Yuki and I collaborated on a design project that turned into a genuine friendship. She's a UX designer with an extraordinary eye for detail and a passion for ceramics in her spare time.
